title: Professional personnel
doc_html:
§559.  Professional personnel

The council shall have the authority to employ professional personnel to provide review functions and follow-up services on audit reports conducted by the legislative auditor.  Follow-up services shall be performed every twelve months.  

Added by Acts 1981, No. 830, §1.

§559.  Professional personnel
The council shall have the authority to employ professional personnel to provide review functions and follow-up services on audit reports conducted by the legislative auditor.  Follow-up services shall be performed every twelve months.
Added by Acts 1981, No. 830, §1.
